name: Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cinnamon, walnuts, chocolate chips, and white sugar; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs and sour cream until creamy. Gradually add brown sugar and salad oil, stirring constantly. Stir in vanilla.
3. In another bowl, mix cracker crumbs, baking powder, and baking soda. Fold into the egg mixture.
4. Grease an 13 x 9-inch baking pan with oil.
5. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan. Sprinkle with half of the cinnamon/sugar mixture.
6. Pour remaining batter over the top of the cake. Sprinkle the rest of the cinnamon/sugar mixture on the cake.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
